event_description: User pins a course to their active plan from the search results.
User unpins a course from their active plan.
User runs the auto-generator to find candidate timetables.
User applies a generated timetable candidate to their plan.
User successfully shares their plan and receives a share URL.
User exports their timetable as an ICS calendar file.
User exports their plan as a JSON backup file.
User imports a plan from a JSON file.
User imports a shared plan into their own plans from the shared view.
Server successfully creates a shareable plan link and stores it in KV.
User clicks a course chip in a requisite view or mini prereq tree to open that course's detail sheet.
User views a course's prerequisite tree on the /tree page (via picker, node click, or a shared ?course= link).
